---
id: authorization-role-assignments-controller-list-role-assignments
title: "List role assignments"
description: "List all role assignments for an organization membership. This returns all roles that have been assigned to the user on resources, including organization-level and sub-resource roles."
sidebar_label: "List role assignments"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: docs/workos-api/workos
custom_edit_url: null
mask_credentials: false
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"List role assignments"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/authorization/organization_memberships/{organization_membership_id}/role_assignments"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



List all role assignments for an organization membership. This returns all roles that have been assigned to the user on resources, including organization-level and sub-resource roles.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
